name: Mistletoe Mint Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the margarine and chocolate chips together in a bowl, stirring until the chocolate is partially melted.
2. Remove from heat and stir until the chocolate chips are completely melted. Pour into another large bowl.
3. Add the brown sugar and water to the bowl, then cool slightly.
4. At high speed, beat in the eggs one at a time.
5. Reduce to low speed and add the dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, salt). Stir until fully blended.
6. Chill the dough for about 30 minutes.
7. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
8. Line cookie sheets with foil.
9. Roll the chilled dough into very small balls (about 1/2 teaspoon per ball) and place them about 2 inches apart on the prepared cookie sheets.
10. Bake for 10 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
11. Remove from the oven while still warm. Place a mint candy piece on each cookie.
12. Let the cookies cool on the pan for about a minute before transferring to waxed paper. This allows the candies to melt slightly and stick better.
